summary: Full backend regression for Lumi (FastAPI + MongoDB + Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations). 26/26 pytest tests passed (100%) against the public preview URL. Covered: auth (signup valid/duplicate/weak/login/me/401), products (list, all 6 filters, filters meta, GET by id, 404, similar), beauty products, wishlist full CRUD, cart full CRUD with line_total+subtotal and qty=0 removal, style quiz (Streetwear + Minimalist identities with persistence verified via /style/profile), beauty face-scan with a real generated JPEG selfie (skin_tone/undertone/skin_type/face_shape/under_eye_tone/lip_shape/eye_shape + 6 recommendation categories all populated), GET /beauty/face-scan/latest reflects latest scan, and stylist chat multi-turn flow with session continuity, ordered messages, and session listing.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 657 lines — still manageable but approaching the recommended split threshold (~700). Consider extracting routers into /app/backend/routers/{auth,products,beauty,style,stylist,cart_wishlist}.py if more features land.

Email normalization is implemented on signup/login (.lower()) — good. However the unique index on users.email is not enforced at the DB level, the race-condition window is small but a unique index would be safer.
POST /api/wishlist returns the same 200 status for both 'added' and 'already_added' — acceptable but a 201 vs 200 distinction would be cleaner REST.
Cart PATCH with quantity<=0 deletes the row — semantically fine and tested, but a DELETE-only path may be preferable for clarity.
Style quiz uses a deterministic keyword-score mapping (not LLM). This is by design per problem statement.
Face-scan/recommendations always returns up to 3 items per category — there is no guarantee category items exist if the beauty seed is reduced; the seed currently covers all 6 categories so it works.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py (new — shared fixtures, JPEG selfie generator using PIL with edges/shadows/textures)
/app/backend/tests/test_lumi_backend.py (new — 26 pytest cases covering all requested flows)
seed_data_creation: Test users created via /api/auth/signup with TEST_ prefix (auto-cleaned scope per session). Generated synthetic JPEG selfie (384x480, JPEG-encoded, features: face oval, eyes, brows, lips, nose, hair, blush, gradient + noise) base64-encoded for face-scan tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_lumi_backend.py -v. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (https://fashion-lens-23.preview.emergentagent.com). Face-scan test calls Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key — takes ~5-10s; full suite ~17s. Tests are idempotent and create their own TEST_* users.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 14 feature areas in the review request behaved as specified.
